evidenceItems.quoteOrDescription: The screenshot title indicates an employee list page.
The employee list table shows columns for name, department, role, and status.
The employee list includes a department filter.
The employee list includes an edit action.
The employee list includes an export action.
The screenshot contains active, inactive, and pending status values.
Role notes mention managers and group-level data responsibility.

claimMappings.claim: The system contains a Staff Management module.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: The employee list page title and table columns directly support a staff management area.

claimMappings.claim: The Staff Management module includes an Employee List page.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: The screenshot title identifies the page as an employee list.
The table columns describe employee records.

claimMappings.claim: Department is likely a related entity.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Department appears as a field and filter, but a standalone department management page is not shown.

claimMappings.claim: Employee status is an enum-like field.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Multiple status labels are visible, but the complete allowed value set is not confirmed.

claimMappings.claim: Manager is a role with group-level responsibility.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Role notes mention managers and group data responsibility, but exact data scope is not confirmed.

claimMappings.claim: Managers can view group-level employee records.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Role notes and department filters support group or department scoping, but cross-department access is unconfirmed.

claimMappings.claim: Managers may edit employee records in their scope.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: The edit action is visible and manager responsibility is noted, but role-specific edit access is not directly confirmed.

claimMappings.claim: Employee status maintenance is an inferred workflow.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Edit action and status values imply a maintenance workflow, but transition rules are not shown.

claimMappings.claim: Manager data scope must be enforced.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Scope enforcement follows from the manager role notes and department filter, but exact scope requires confirmation.

claimMappings.claim: Employee status values must be validated.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Visible status values suggest validation requirements, but the full value set is unconfirmed.
Evidence suggests scoped access, but does not settle cross-department visibility.

claimMappings.claim: Employee status enum values need confirmation.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: Some values are visible, but not enough to claim a complete enum.
The workflow is inferred from UI signals without explicit transition rules.

claimMappings.claim: Employee records may require soft deletion.
claimMappings.reasoningSummary: This is a common auditability assumption but has no direct evidence.
